en.name: Level 60 — The Baywalk
en.shortDescription: A dark bayside concrete promenade with broken streetlights, prowled by Smilers and a calming mental effect that lures wanderers to drown.
en.atmosphere: An unsettling seaside walk of malfunctioning lights and constant Smiler presence, laced with an insidious 'painless death' pull.
en.tips: Travel in groups to resist the Painless Death effect. Avoid the upper area; prep in the lower dirt section. Remember the Guide.
